   "id": "a8ce5a73",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "# Imposed Curvature\n",
    "\n",
    "An **imposed-curvature** (or initial-strain) load applies a *free*, stress-free\n",
    "curvature field along a member &mdash; the mechanism for modelling creep,\n",
    "shrinkage and thermal effects. It is a **loading** (load type&nbsp;6, added with\n",
    "`BeamAnalysis.add_ic`), not an element.\n",
    "\n",
    "The companion tutorial, [Non-prismatic Elements](nonprismatic.ipynb), covers the\n",
    "variable-$EI$ element. Example 2 below combines the two, applying an imposed\n",
    "curvature to a non-prismatic (haunched) beam. The underlying method is in the\n",
    "[Theoretical Basis](../theory.ipynb); the source texts are on the\n",
    "[References](../references.md) page."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 1,
   "id": "07209674",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-06-11T11:08:36.236318Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-06-11T11:08:36.236261Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-06-11T11:08:36.575753Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-06-11T11:08:36.575288Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "import pycba as cba\n",
    "import numpy as np\n",
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "from pycba import SectionEI"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "057684ae",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## Example 1 - Imposed curvature on a continuous beam\n",
    "\n",
    "An imposed curvature is *self-strained*: on a simply-supported span it produces\n",
    "deflection but no reactions. On a **continuous** beam the restraint of the free\n",
    "curvature generates real moments. For two equal spans under a uniform curvature\n",
    "$\\kappa$ the interior-support moment is $-1.5\\,EI\\kappa$ and the system is\n",
    "self-equilibrating (zero net reaction)."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 2,
   "id": "eecd0868",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-06-11T11:08:36.577132Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-06-11T11:08:36.576990Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-06-11T11:08:36.580795Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-06-11T11:08:36.580526Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "Interior-support moment =  -27.00 kNm  (closed form -1.5 EI k = -27.00)\n",
      "Sum of reactions        = +0.00e+00 kN  (self-equilibrating)\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "# A uniform free curvature kappa on each span (e.g. shrinkage / thermal).\n",
    "L, EI, kappa = 10.0, 180000.0, 1e-4\n",
    "ba = cba.BeamAnalysis([L, L], EI, [-1, 0, -1, 0, -1, 0])\n",
    "ba.add_ic(1, kappa)\n",
    "ba.add_ic(2, kappa)\n",
    "ba.analyze(npts=301)\n",
    "\n",
    "res = ba.beam_results.results\n",
    "M_pier = res.M[np.argmin(np.abs(res.x - L))]\n",
    "print(f\"Interior-support moment = {M_pier:7.2f} kNm  (closed form -1.5 EI k = {-1.5*EI*kappa:.2f})\")\n",
    "print(f\"Sum of reactions        = {np.sum(ba.beam_results.R):+.2e} kN  (self-equilibrating)\")"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 3,
   "id": "97c7e1a1",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-06-11T11:08:36.581457Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-06-11T11:08:36.581390Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-06-11T11:08:36.667822Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-06-11T11:08:36.667576Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 700x500 with 2 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "# Bending moment and deflected shape under the imposed curvature.\n",
    "fig, axs = plt.subplots(2, 1, figsize=(7, 5), sharex=True)\n",
    "axs[0].axhline(0, color=\"k\", lw=1.0)\n",
    "axs[0].plot(res.x, res.M, \"r\")\n",
    "axs[0].invert_yaxis()\n",
    "axs[0].set_ylabel(\"Bending moment (kNm)\")\n",
    "axs[0].set_title(\"Two-span beam under a uniform imposed curvature\")\n",
    "axs[0].grid(True)\n",
    "\n",
    "axs[1].axhline(0, color=\"k\", lw=1.0)\n",
    "axs[1].plot(res.x, res.D * 1e3, \"b\")\n",
    "axs[1].set_ylabel(\"Deflection (mm)\")\n",
    "axs[1].set_xlabel(\"Distance along beam (m)\")\n",
    "axs[1].grid(True)\n",
    "fig.tight_layout()"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "0a7d7295",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## Example 2 - Imposed curvature on a non-prismatic member\n",
    "\n",
    "The two features combine naturally: an imposed curvature applied to a\n",
    "`SectionEI` member. The fixed-end forces are integrated across the section\n",
    "breakpoints, so the variable rigidity is honoured exactly. Here the haunched\n",
    "two-span beam from the [Non-prismatic Elements](nonprismatic.ipynb) tutorial\n",
    "carries a uniform curvature &mdash; the stiffer pier attracts a larger restraint\n",
    "moment than the prismatic beam."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 4,
   "id": "eb220a9b",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-06-11T11:08:36.668884Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-06-11T11:08:36.668812Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-06-11T11:08:36.679370Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-06-11T11:08:36.679109Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "Prismatic pier moment =  -81.00 kNm  (closed form -1.5 EI k = -81.00)\n",
      "Haunched  pier moment = -122.36 kNm  (stiffer pier draws more restraint moment)\n",
      "Sum of reactions      = +0.00e+00 kN  (still self-equilibrating)\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "# Build the same haunched two-span beam as in the Non-prismatic Elements\n",
    "# tutorial, then apply the imposed curvature instead of a UDL.\n",
    "E, b = 30.0e6, 1.0\n",
    "Lsp, DC, Dh, Lh = 10.0, 0.6, 1.2, 3.0\n",
    "EI_const = E * b * DC**3 / 12.0\n",
    "\n",
    "\n",
    "def haunch_poly(d_end, d_pier, x_end, x_pier):\n",
    "    \"\"\"Parabolic depth: flat (vertex) at the shallow end (d_end at x_end),\n",
    "    deepening to d_pier at the support (x_pier).  Returns an EI(x) callable.\"\"\"\n",
    "    def f(x):\n",
    "        s = (np.asarray(x, float) - x_end) / (x_pier - x_end)\n",
    "        return E * b * (d_end + (d_pier - d_end) * s**2) ** 3 / 12.0\n",
    "    return f\n",
    "\n",
    "\n",
    "sec1 = SectionEI([\n",
    "    (\"const\", [0.0, Lsp - Lh], EI_const),\n",
    "    (\"poly\",  [Lsp - Lh, Lsp], haunch_poly(DC, Dh, Lsp - Lh, Lsp), 6),\n",
    "])\n",
    "sec2 = SectionEI([   # mirror of span 1 about the pier\n",
    "    (\"poly\",  [0.0, Lh], haunch_poly(DC, Dh, Lh, 0.0), 6),\n",
    "    (\"const\", [Lh, Lsp], EI_const),\n",
    "])\n",
    "\n",
    "ba_np = cba.BeamAnalysis([Lsp, Lsp], [sec1, sec2], [-1, 0, -1, 0, -1, 0])\n",
    "ba_np.add_ic(1, kappa)\n",
    "ba_np.add_ic(2, kappa)\n",
    "ba_np.analyze(npts=300)\n",
    "M_pier_np = ba_np.beam_results.results.M.min()\n",
    "\n",
    "# prismatic reference at the mid-depth rigidity\n",
    "ba_npp = cba.BeamAnalysis([Lsp, Lsp], [EI_const, EI_const], [-1, 0, -1, 0, -1, 0])\n",
    "ba_npp.add_ic(1, kappa)\n",
    "ba_npp.add_ic(2, kappa)\n",
    "ba_npp.analyze(npts=300)\n",
    "M_pier_npp = ba_npp.beam_results.results.M.min()\n",
    "\n",
    "print(f\"Prismatic pier moment = {M_pier_npp:7.2f} kNm  (closed form -1.5 EI k = {-1.5*EI_const*kappa:.2f})\")\n",
    "print(f\"Haunched  pier moment = {M_pier_np:7.2f} kNm  (stiffer pier draws more restraint moment)\")\n",
    "print(f\"Sum of reactions      = {np.sum(ba_np.beam_results.R):+.2e} kN  (still self-equilibrating)\")"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 5,
   "id": "9691575c",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-06-11T11:08:36.680056Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-06-11T11:08:36.679991Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-06-11T11:08:36.834061Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-06-11T11:08:36.833739Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 700x520 with 2 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "# EI(x) elevation and the resulting BMD (haunched vs prismatic).\n",
    "xx = np.linspace(0.0, Lsp, 200)\n",
    "EI_prof = np.concatenate([sec1(xx), sec2(xx)]) / 1e6\n",
    "x_prof = np.concatenate([xx, Lsp + xx])\n",
    "\n",
    "fig, axs = plt.subplots(2, 1, figsize=(7, 5.2), sharex=True)\n",
    "axs[0].plot(x_prof, EI_prof, \"b\", lw=2)\n",
    "axs[0].axvline(Lsp, color=\"k\", lw=0.8)\n",
    "axs[0].set_ylabel(\"$EI$  (MNm$^2$)\")\n",
    "axs[0].set_title(\"Imposed curvature on the haunched (non-prismatic) beam\")\n",
    "axs[0].grid(True)\n",
    "\n",
    "axs[1].axhline(0, color=\"k\", lw=1.0)\n",
    "axs[1].plot(ba_npp.beam_results.results.x, ba_npp.beam_results.results.M, \"0.5\", ls=\"--\",\n",
    "            label=f\"prismatic (pier {M_pier_npp:.0f} kNm)\")\n",
    "axs[1].plot(ba_np.beam_results.results.x, ba_np.beam_results.results.M, \"r\",\n",
    "            label=f\"haunched (pier {M_pier_np:.0f} kNm)\")\n",
    "axs[1].invert_yaxis()\n",
    "axs[1].set_ylabel(\"Bending moment (kNm)\")\n",
    "axs[1].set_xlabel(\"Distance along beam (m)\")\n",
    "axs[1].grid(True)\n",
    "axs[1].legend(loc=\"upper left\")\n",
    "fig.tight_layout()"
   ]
  }
 ],
